ModMetadata.Name: Force Field Door Mod Fix
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]No longer needed: ForceFieldDoorMod has been fixed[/h1]
[b]As of 6 July 2026 the original ForceFieldDoorMod has been updated by its author and works on current Stationeers builds on its own. This compatibility fix is no longer required.[/b]
[b]What to do:[/b] [list] [*][b]You can safely unsubscribe[/b] from Force Field Door Mod Fix. Nothing else depends on it. [*][b]It is also safe to leave it enabled.[/b] It automatically detects that ForceFieldDoorMod is fixed and does nothing at all, so it will not interfere with anything. [/list]
Thanks to the ForceFieldDoorMod author for shipping the proper fix upstream.
[hr][/hr]
[h1]What this mod was[/h1]
A temporary compatibility shim. ForceFieldDoorMod was built against an older Stationeers build and, on 0.2.6403 and later, called a one-argument GridController.CanContainAtmos method the game had removed. That threw a MissingMethodException every atmospheric tick and stopped the whole simulation on any world containing a force field door. This mod took over the door's atmospheric tick and ran a corrected version until the original was updated. That has now happened, so it stands down on its own.
[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
[b]Requires:[/b] BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad. Works on clients and dedicated servers. No settings.
[h2]Reporting Issues[/h2] If you run into a bug, please open an issue on [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/issues]GitHub[/url]. Please include the mod name in the title.
[h2]Credits[/h2] [list] [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3328065049]ForceFieldDoorMod[/url] by WIKUS and BoNes: the original mod, now fixed by them. All credit for the force field door belongs to them. [/list]
[url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/tree/master/Mods/ForceFieldDoorModFix]Source Code on GitHub[/url]
[h2]License[/h2] Licensed under the [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/blob/master/LICENSE]Apache License 2.0[/url]. Attribution required; see the LICENSE and NOTICE files at the repository root.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v1.0.1: ForceFieldDoorMod fixed upstream, this mod is no longer needed - The original ForceFieldDoorMod was updated by its author on 6 July 2026 and now works on current Stationeers builds on its own. - This compatibility fix is no longer required. You can safely unsubscribe; it is also safe to leave it enabled, since it detects the upstream fix and does nothing. - Description-only update to inform subscribers. No functional change.
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: No longer needed ForceFieldDoorMod has been fixed by its author (6 July 2026). This compatibility fix is no longer required. You can safely unsubscribe. It is also safe to leave it enabled: it detects that ForceFieldDoorMod is fixed and does nothing. What it was: a temporary shim that kept ForceFieldDoorMod working on 0.2.6403+ until the author updated it. Requires: BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad. Credits: ForceFieldDoorMod by WIKUS and BoNes, now fixed by them.
